creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 152450
Proposed patch (since 377569 revision)

Patch to update games/pioneer port from 0.0.20141230 to 0.0.20150201 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/compare/20141230...20150201

To users (just for note; not for commit message):
This version could not use your saved games from previous version. In this case, either use the previous version or start a new game.
